General.Name: Aardvark Therapeutics, Inc. Common Stock
General.Description: Aardvark Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on developing small-molecule therapeutics to activate innate homeostatic pathways for the treatment of metabolic diseases. Aardvark Therapeutics, Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in San Diego, California.
General.Address: 4370 La Jolla Village Drive, San Diego, CA, United States, 92122
